member.name: T:DDG.DffField
member.summary: Defines the DffField class.

member.name: P:DDG.DffField.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dff token name.

member.name: P:DDG.DffField.DieId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dff die id.

member.name: P:DDG.DffField.Optype
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dff optype.

member.name: T:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner
member.summary: Interface for the VminForwardingCorner object.

member.name: P:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.Flow
member.summary: Gets the Flow associated with this VminCorner.

member.name: P:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.Name
member.summary: Gets a comma-separate list of FullCorner Names for this object (CR0@F1,CR1@F1).

member.name: P:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.Frequency
member.summary: Gets the frequency associated with the first instance in this object.

member.name: P:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.Domain
member.summary: Gets the domain associated with the first instance in this object.

member.name: P:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.Corner
member.summary: Gets the corner associated with the first instance in this object.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.GetFrequency
member.summary: Gets the frequencies associated with every corner in this object.
member.returns: List of frequencies in the same order as corners were created.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.GetStartingVoltage(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Double})
member.summary: Gets the starting voltage for this corner. This will be the maximum of: the passed in value startVoltagesFromParameter, FastInfra.xml gsds_vmin_source values, FastInfra.xml interdomaincorner_vmin_source values.
member.returns: The starting voltage to use for the search.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.GetStartingVoltage(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Double})
member.summary: Gets the starting voltage for this corner. This will be the maximum of: the passed in value startVoltagesFromParameter, FastInfra.xml gsds_vmin_source values, FastInfra.xml interdomaincorner_vmin_source values.
member.returns: The starting voltage to use for the search.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.GetStartingVoltage(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.Double)
member.summary: Gets the starting voltage for this corner. This will be the maximum of: the passed in value startVoltagesFromParameter, FastInfra.xml gsds_vmin_source values, FastInfra.xml interdomaincorner_vmin_source values.
member.returns: The starting voltage to use for the search.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.GetStartingVoltage(System.Double)
member.summary: Gets the starting voltage for this corner. This will be the maximum of: the passed in value startVoltagesFromParameter, FastInfra.xml gsds_vmin_source values, FastInfra.xml interdomaincorner_vmin_source values.
member.returns: The starting voltage to use for the search.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.GetStartingVoltage(System.Double,DDG.VminForwardingReadType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the starting voltage for this corner. This will be the maximum of: the passed in value startVoltagesFromParameter, FastInfra.xml gsds_vmin_source values, FastInfra.xml interdomaincorner_vmin_source values.
member.param: Set a flag to read specified tier voltages.
Set a flag to read normalized values.
member.returns: The starting voltage to use for the search.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.StoreVminResult(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Double})
member.summary: Updates the vmin forwarding value for this corner. Will also update values associated with the FastInfra.xml store_results_in_gsds and tokens_for_downstream_sockets attributes.
member.returns: true if the vmin data was stored correctly.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingCorner.StoreVminResult(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.Double)
member.summary: Updates the vmin forwarding value for this corner. Will also update values associated with the FastInfra.xml store_results_in_gsds and tokens_for_downstream_sockets attributes.
member.returns: true if the vmin data was stored correctly.

member.name: T:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.Get(System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Factory method.
member.returns: VminForwarding Corner interface.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.Get(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Factory method for creating a IVminForwardingCorner=.
member.param: Domain name (either a single name or a comma separated list).
member.returns: VminForwarding Corner interface.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.GetAllDomainNames(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets a list of all domain names from Primes VminForwarding structures.
member.returns: List of Domain names as strings.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.GetInstanceNamesForDomain(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the list of Instance names for the given Domain name. (ie. returns [CR0, CR1, CR2, CR3] when given CR).
member.returns: List of instance names as strings.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.GetCornerNamesForDomainInstance(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the list of valid frequency corner names for this instance. This is the full DomainInstance@Corner name.
member.returns: List of valid corners as a string.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.GetFrequency(System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the frequency constant for the given corner.
member.param: Full VminForwarding Corner name (ie CR0@F1, CLR@F6).
Flow ID (needed if this corner uses a binmatrix constant for its frequency).
member.returns: frequency for the corner.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.GetDomainName(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets domain name for the given full corner name.
member.param: Full VminForwarding Corner name (ie CR0@F1, CLR@F6).
member.returns: Domain name.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.GetDffTokenMap(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Retrieves the Domain/Corner to Dff token mapping.
member.returns: Dff Token map as a Dictionary with Keys=DFF Token and Value=SharedStorage Use dBy VminForwarding.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.IsSinglePointMode(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Retrieves the IsSinglePointMode token from shared storage.
member.returns: true if Vmin searches are disabled and should only run a single point.

member.name: M:DDG.IVminForwardingFactory.IsSearchGuardbandEnabled(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Retrieves the SearchGuardbandEnable token from shared storage.
member.returns: true if VminTC should enable its SearchGuardband parameter.

member.name: T:DDG.VminForwarding
member.summary: Singleton for DieRecovery service.
Defines the .

member.name: P:DDG.VminForwarding.Service
member.summary: Gets or sets VminForwarding Service implementation.

member.name: T:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingSnapshot
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains the snapshot data.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingSnapshotContext
member.summary: Gets the context of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains the snapshot data.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingDffMap
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains the VminForwarding Domain/Corner to DFF Token mapping.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingDffMapContext
member.summary: Gets the context of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains the VminForwarding Domain/Corner to DFF Token mapping.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingFlagContext
member.summary: Gets the context for any of the VminForwarding flags.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingSinglePointMode
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains flag which forces Vmin searches to be single point tests.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingSearchGuardbandEnable
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains flag for VminTC SearchGuardband.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingUseLimitCheckAsSourceEnable
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains StoreVoltages flag.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingUseVoltagesSourcesEnable
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains StoreVoltages flag.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingUseLimitCheckEnable
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains StoreVoltages flag.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingStoreVoltagesEnable
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains StoreVoltages flag.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.VminForwardingStoreVoltagesDoubleTap
member.summary: Gets the name of the Vmin Forwarding SharedStorage Object which contains StoreVoltages flag.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.NameSeparator
member.summary: Gets the string used as a separator in shared storage naming.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.PlistModeTokenName
member.summary: Shared storage token name for plist mode. Value is an integer. 1 for combined plist mode, 0 for monolithic plist mode.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.EnableVminNormalizerTokenName
member.summary: Shared storage token name for VminNormalizer enable.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.DisablePerCoreOvershoot
member.summary: Disable per core overshoot token name. In case of an overshoot, all cores are adjusted to the retry voltage.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.FlowIndexMode
member.summary: Shared storage token name for flow index mode.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwarding.Globals.EnableVminStoreResult
member.summary: Shared storage token name for Enable Vmin Store Result.

member.name: T:DDG.VminForwardingReadType
member.summary: Vmin forwarding read type.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwardingReadType.All
member.summary: Read both Tier0 and Tier1 voltages.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwardingReadType.Tier1
member.summary: Read only Tier1 voltages.

member.name: F:DDG.VminForwardingReadType.Tier0
member.summary: Read only Tier0 voltages.

member.name: T:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingFactory
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingFactory.GetInstanceNamesForDomain(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.exception: Thrown if domain is not valid.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingFactory.GetCornerNamesForDomainInstance(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.exception: Thrown if instance is not valid.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingFactory.GetFrequency(System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.exception: Thrown if domain or corner is not valid.

member.name: T:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: F:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.VminMhzFrequencyInMhzPrecisionSignificantBits
member.summary: Gets the number of significant bits to use when comparing frequency (in mhz) values.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.#ctor(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Prime IConsoleService or null if no printing is required.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.GetVoltage(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the current Voltage for a given VminCorner and Flow. Corner should be the full instance@frequencycorner style -- CR0@F3.
member.returns: the current Voltage for the corner.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.GetVoltage(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the current Voltage for a given VminCorner and Flow. Corner should be the full instance@frequencycorner style -- CR0@F3.
member.returns: the current Voltage for the corner.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.GetVoltage(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.String,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Tuple{System.Double,System.Double}})
member.summary: Gets the interpolated voltage for the given VminForwarding Instance at the target frequency using the current voltages at the given flow. Calculated from linear interpolation using the next lower/higher frequency corners, or the closest two corners if the target is outside the normal corner frequency range.
member.param: VminForwarding Instance name. Like CR1, CRU2.
Flow ID to get the current vmin data from.
Target frequency (in Hz) to calculate the new vmin for.
Pass frequency voltage pairs for linear prediction.
member.returns: The interpolated voltage for the given frequency.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.GetVoltage(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.String,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Gets the interpolated voltage for the given VminForwarding Instance at the target frequency using the current voltages at the given flow. Calculated from linear interpolation using the next lower/higher frequency corners, or the closest two corners if the target is outside the normal corner frequency range.
member.param: VminForwarding Instance name. Like CR1, CRU2.
Flow ID to get the current vmin data from.
Target frequency (in Hz) to calculate the new vmin for.
member.returns: The interpolated voltage for the given frequency.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.GetVoltage(System.String,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Tuple{System.Double,System.Double}})
member.summary: Gets the interpolated voltage for the given VminForwarding Instance at the target frequency using the current voltages at the given flow. Calculated from linear interpolation using the next lower/higher frequency corners, or the closest two corners if the target is outside the normal corner frequency range.
member.param: VminForwarding Instance name. Like CR1, CRU2.
Flow ID to get the current vmin data from.
Target frequency (in Hz) to calculate the new vmin for.
Pass frequency voltage pairs for linear prediction.
member.returns: The interpolated voltage for the given frequency.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.AdjustVminUsingFrequencyScaling(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.String,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Adjust current corner voltage using linear calculation between current frequency and corner's frequency.
member.returns: Adjusted Vmin.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingPrediction.InterpolateVmin(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingDataType,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Interpolates vmin using adjacent frequency corners.
member.returns: Original, adjusted Vmin.

member.name: T:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable
member.summary: Main VminForwardingTable class.

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of Domain Instance @ Corner names (ie CR0@F1, CR1@F3).

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: String containing comma separated list of Domain Instance @ Corner names (ie CR0@F1, CR1@F3).

member.name: M:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: String containing comma separated list of Domain Instance names.
String containing a single Frequency Corner.

member.name: P:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable.Console
member.summary: Gets a variable holding Prime.Services.ConsoleService or null depending on the current instances LogLevel.

member.name: P:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets a variable holding the ISessionContextProviderContainer for this instance.

member.name: P:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable.Instances
member.summary: Gets or sets the List of Vmin Corners associated with this object.

member.name: P:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable.VminHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vmin corner object from Prime.

member.name: P:VminForwardingBase.VminForwardingTable.StoreVoltages
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether Prime VminForwarding StoreVoltages is true or false.
